task.role: You are a Go Engineer specializing in APIs and backend services. Implement Task 10 with production-quality code.

context.overview: Create comprehensive end-to-end tests that validate the complete notification flow from submission through delivery, including all services, WebSocket updates, and cross-platform client functionality.
context.background: This task is part of AlertHub notification platform. - PRD: .tasks/docs/prd.md - Related tasks: task-5, task-6, task-7, task-8

requirements.description: 1. Set up test environment with all services running 2. Create test data fixtures for tenants, users, and integrations 3. Implement notification submission and routing tests 4. Add delivery verification for each channel (Slack, Discord, email) 5. Test WebSocket real-time updates across web and desktop 6. Verify mobile push notification delivery 7. Test rate limiting and deduplication logic 8. Add performance tests for throughput requirements 9. Create failure scenario tests (service outages, network issues) 10. Set up CI pipeline to run E2E tests on deployment

constraints.constraint: PR title: feat(task-10): Implement End-to-End Integration Tests (Grizz - Go/Testing)

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Complete notification flow works end-to-end (submit → route → deliver → display), all clients receive real-time updates, delivery succeeds to configured channels, rate limiting prevents abuse, performance meets SLA requirements (< 100ms p95), and failure scenarios are handled gracefully.

decision_point.description: Should E2E tests run against production-like infrastructure or simplified test doubles?
What should be the target for E2E test suite execution time?
